title: Vivid Peruvian Redcurrant Skewers
description: Fresh, glassy-jelly skewers glazed with a manteca-emulsified sauce, bursting with Peruvian flavors and low-FODMAP ingredients.
instructions: Soak wooden skewers in water for 30 minutes to prevent burning.
In a small bowl whisk together olive oil, red wine vinegar, sugar, lime juice, melted butter, grated ginger, chili flakes, and salt until smooth.
Thread alternating redcurrants and pineapple chunks onto soaked skewers.
Preheat an outdoor grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Brush the skewers with the manteca-emulsified glaze and place them on the grill.
Grill the skewers for about 3 minutes per side, basting with more glaze, until the fruit is lightly charred and syrupy.
Remove from the grill and sprinkle with fresh cilantro and toasted sesame seeds.
Serve immediately with a side of lime wedges for extra brightness.
